features: High-quality Stainless Steel Material: This silver metal nail files for natural nails is made of high-quality stainless steel, which is sturdy and durable, rust-proof and anti-corrosion, ensuring high performance for long-lasting use, and diamond deb nail file is the perfect choice for daily nail care.

Multifunctional Use: Our stainless steel nail file provides can trim, polish and clean nails. The double-sided sapphire powder adheres firmly to the surface, providing ample wear for trimming and polishing. The metal nail file with sharp pointed tip is ideal for delicately cleaning under the nails.

Portable Design: The metal nail files with sharp pointed tip size of the nail file is 6.34× 0.94 inches/16.1 × 2.4 cm, which is very easy to carry, whether you use it at home or travel. Metal fingernail file keep your nails neat and beautiful anytime, anywhere.
Package Content: Each pack contains 2 metal emery boards for nails, each piece is individually packaged, this diamond dust nail file is convenient to carry and use, meeting your long-term use needs.

Wide Range of Uses: Our diamond nail file are very suitable for natural nails, acrylic nails, gel nails, etc. Equipped with a sharp tip, it can effectively remove dirt under the nails to meet various nail care needs. Nail file stainless steel can even be used to trim and modify the nails of pet cats/dogs!
description: Product Description: This professional-grade stainless steel nail file is a versatile and durable tool designed for comprehensive nail care. Crafted from high-quality, rust-proof metal and coated with double-sided sapphire powder, it effortlessly trims, shapes, and polishes natural, acrylic, and gel nails. Its sharp, pointed tip allows for delicate cleaning under the nail, while its compact, portable design makes it perfect for maintaining beautiful nails at home or on the go. Each pack includes two individually wrapped files, ensuring long-lasting performance and hygiene. Specifications: Category: Nail File Color: Silver Material: Stainless Steel Function: Tool Product Dimensions: 6.06 × 0.42 × 0.03 inches / 15.4 × 1.1 × 0.08 cm Packaging Dimensions: 24 × 13 × 0.3 cm Packaging Method: Bag Net Weight: 23 g Gross Weight: 23 g Package List: 2 silver nail files per pack
